metadata.description: Personal library of AI agent skills for Claude Code and other harnesses.

plugins.name: delegate
plugins.description: Delegates grunt work to opencode running free LiteLLM models — saves Claude tokens.

plugins.name: sophia-review
plugins.description: End-to-end Sophia competency self-review assistant — phased chat that harvests a year of evidence, surfaces next-level rubric differentials, drafts rubric-aligned answers, and submits + verifies them via the Sophia API.
